name: Snap Inc.
description: Snap Inc. is an American technology and social media company headquartered in Santa Monica, California. Best known for its flagship product, Snapchat, the company focuses on developing innovative camera-based experiences that empower people to express themselves, live in the moment, and learn about the world. Beyond its popular messaging application, Snap Inc. is a leader in augmented reality (AR) technology, creating tools and platforms that integrate digital content with the physical world. Through its diverse portfolio, the company continues to shape the future of digital communication, creative expression, and immersive AR experiences for a global user base.
